title: Source Han Sans Font Pack
description: Allows you to use the same Source Han Sans font from Minecraft Bedrock Edition in Minecraft Java Edition.
body:
**Source Han Sans** is an open-source font jointly developed by Adobe and Google, featuring multiple weights and a high-quality design.

**Source Han Sans** has been adopted as the UI font for Minecraft Bedrock Edition, boasting a more elegant and modern look than the original font. This resource pack brings the same font to Minecraft Java Edition!

**Supported Languages:**
- English
- Chinese
- Japanese

**Before use, please set 'Force Unicode Font' to OFF in the options to ensure the font displays correctly.**

_The font copyright belongs to the original author_
